Novice puzzle quest, only 10 Construction required. Climb the tower fixing 3 broken machines with scavenged parts: a pressure/valve-and-lever pipe puzzle, a simpler pipe-fitting puzzle, and a cage-building puzzle where each of 4 sides needs specific horizontal/vertical piece sizes placed in order. Afterward, answer the Homunculus's back-and-forth dialogue quiz picking consistently either all 'Logic' or all 'Magic' answers to finish the questline and unlock the Creature Creation minigame. A raw chicken + raw swordfish let you optionally kill a 'swordchick' afterward for a Medium Ardougne diary task.

steps.detail: Sibling rivalry between the kings of Jatizso and Neitiznot. Needs The Fremennik Trials done, 20 Construction (boostable), and the ability to kill a level 122 Troll King plus 10 ice trolls in a multicombat zone. Do a jester-outfit fetch task for Jatizso's king (tribute of ores), run a tax-collection errand around Jatizso for the king (upsets a black-market NPC you can later square with a bribe), repair 2 rope bridges on Neitiznot for spymaster Mawnis (keep Protect from Missiles on -- damage from trolls stacks and only applies once the repair animation finishes), then craft/buy yak-hide armour and a Neitiznot shield as tribute, before fighting through 10 ice trolls (multicombat, use Protect from Missiles) to reach and melee down the Ice Troll King (high Magic/Ranged defence, so bring melee).

steps.detail: Kourend/Kebos Lowlands quest. Speak to Gordon and Mary about their missing livestock, use a pot of flour on the southern gate to lay a scent trail south past the bridge and west into the Kebos Lowlands mine cave, kill the level-82 Headless Beast there. Craft a fake head to fool them: soft clay knifed into a clay head, fur+needle/thread into a fur head, red dye for a bloody head, then mount it on the wall with two planks and six nails. Report back to Gordon to finish.

First quest in the Sea Slug series and #3 in the Temple Knight series. Give Holgart swamp paste to fix his boat and reach the Fishing Platform; find Bailey to learn sea slugs fear heat, rescue Kennith's father Kent from a nearby island, then light a torch (needs Firemaking 30, boostable) using broken glass + damp sticks, and use it to save Kennith from the platform machinery. CORRECTION to the depth:04 queue payload: its rationale text calls this quest's unlock 'Fishing Guild access' -- the quest's own Rewards section states the unlock is 'Access to the Fishing Platform', not the Fishing Guild; these are different locations and the brief's phrasing appears to be an error. Gates The Slug Menace (sequel).

steps.detail: Second Temple Knight quest, a direct sequel to Wanted! (so it inherits that entire chain: Recruitment Drive, Black Knights' Fortress, Druidic Ritual, The Lost Tribe, Rune Mysteries, Goblin Diplomacy, Enter the Abyss, Priest in Peril) plus Sea Slug and 30 Crafting/Runecraft/Slayer/Thieving. Investigate odd behaviour in Witchaven by interviewing 3 townsfolk, find a hidden dungeon behind a false wall with a locked 'imposing door', scan it with the Commorb to get a torn transcription, then recover and repair 2 more page fragments (one from the mayor's desk, one solved via a sea-slug-glue matching puzzle on the Fishing Platform). Shape essence into all 5 rune types at their respective altars, use the finished runes to open the door, then melee-only kill the level 62 Slug Prince (drains Prayer, safespottable with a halberd).

steps.detail: No formal quest prerequisites, but recreating King Alvis's battleaxe needs Thurgo (Mudskipper Point smith) which can be found either via The Knight's Sword or by asking the Keldagrim librarian then Reldo in Varrock library (no quest completion actually required). Introduces Keldagrim city. Flow: talk Dwarven Boatman, then Commander Veldaban, then Blasidar the sculptor (east Keldagrim) who needs exquisite clothes+boots+a repaired dwarven battleaxe for a statue. Clothes: get a costume book from a bookcase in the library (need <30kg weight to climb), buy coal/logs-spun cloth from Vermundi for 200gp. Boots: steal the left boot from Dromund when he's not looking, telegrab the right boot through his window. Axe: get it from Santiri's weapon shop, socket 3 sapphires, take to Thurgo at Mudskipper Point with an iron bar to repair (may need a redberry pie bribe). Deliver all 3 items to Riki (Blasidar's model) then talk Blasidar for a cutscene. Join the Consortium: pick one company (not Red Axe) upstairs in the market, run ore-delivery fetch-tasks for their secretary (hidden score, 20 points per success, need 100 to progress, wearing full H.A.M. robes gives Purple Pewter a +20 head start), then bar-delivery tasks for the director, then formally join the company and report back to Commander Veldaban to finish. Do not world-hop mid-consortium-grind or progress is lost.

steps.detail: Archaeology-themed goblin quest: dig up 6 artefacts in a cave south of Dorgesh-Kaan's middle level and clean them on a specimen table for Tegdak, which uncovers another H.A.M. plot. Teleport to the Goblin Village with Zanik following, then fight through an ambush killing a level-30 H.A.M. Mage and level-30 H.A.M. Archer with Ranged/Magic only (a spare crossbow+bolts spawns nearby if unequipped). Sneak past goblin guards in the Lumbridge Swamp Caves via a scripted stealth sequence with a goblin-sergeant escort, then fight Sigmund (level 64) at the end -- save the ancient mace's special attack until after he activates Protect from Melee/prayer, since the special disables his prayer for the rest of the fight. Untie Zanik to finish; optionally ride the train to Keldagrim afterward for a Lumbridge & Draynor Diary hard task.

steps.detail: Part 2 of the Rise of the Red Axe series (after The Giant Dwarf). Investigate the Red Axe via an extremely drunk, kebab-obsessed dwarf: ply him with beer, fetch a random item requested by a rowdy dwarf, deliver a dwarven stout to Khorvak, then grow kelda seeds in the Kelda Hops Patch (15-20 min real-time wait) and brew them into kelda ale at the East Keldagrim pub vat (another 15-20 min wait) -- plan filler activities like High Alch around the waits. Explore a closed-off minecart tunnel through 6 rooms, including 3 sliding-block cart-track puzzles and a room requiring you to read 3 Red Axe documents. Finish by drinking a beer and eating a kebab back at the eastern pub after reporting to Veldaban.

steps.detail: Dialogue-free, environmental-storytelling 'Twisted Tale' quest. Translate a lost lizardman/Old Ones language by finding stone tablets, wood carvings and dirty notes across four hidden dungeons in sequence (Kebos campsite, Lake Molch Island, Xeric's Shrine, Ruins of Morra); each dungeon's translated words unlock the location clue for the next. Concludes revealing the Old Ones performed soul transference before the Citizens of Arceuus ever did. Wiki lists 'Required for completing: Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire' (Twisted Tale companion-quest cross-reference, not a normal prerequisite chain).

steps.detail: Two-trip Entrana quest that unlocks the balloon transport network -- explicitly a hard prerequisite for Monkey Madness II's Gnome Stronghold route. Trip 1: gather papyrus/candle/dye/silk/sand-filled sacks around Entrana to help Auguste build a balloon frame. Trip 2 (after leaving to gather logs/willow branches, since axes can't be brought to Entrana): attach 12 willow branches and 10 regular logs to the balloon. Piloting is a 3-screen minigame of dropping sandbags, burning logs, pulling coloured ropes, and "relaxing" a set number of times per prompt to control altitude/direction -- crashing just costs 10 more logs and a restart from Auguste. Optionally stockpile extra noted logs (oak/willow/yew/magic) in log storage to unlock further balloon routes post-quest.

steps.detail: Long quest, mostly farming-timer-gated. Talk to Ellamaria then the Wise Old Man in Draynor (wearing ring of charos) to pass a quiz. Grow seeds for 5 NPCs to trade up to rarer seeds: Lyra (west of Port Phasmatys, fairy ring AJQ) grows onions for orchid seeds; Kragen (north Ardougne, fairy ring BJR) grows cabbages for snowdrop seeds; Elstan (south Falador) grows marigolds for delphinium seeds; Dantaera (Catherby) needs a cutting from the White Tree on Ice Mountain grown in a filled plant pot; Brother Althric (Edgeville monastery) needs the ring of charos(a) thrown down the well then retrieved with a fishing rod, plus rune dust used on a plant cure for diseased vines, for rose seeds; Bernald (behind Burthorpe pub) similarly needs a plant-cure/rune-dust vine cure via Alain at the Taverley tree patch, for vine seeds. Then move two statues via trolley (Lumbridge king statue east across the bridge to the garden's east plinth; Falador Saradomin statue north through the gate, cutscene, to the south plinth). Finally plant everything with compost/supercompost in the garden (10-15 min grow, cannot die), talk to Ellamaria, then King Roald (ring of charos(a) must be equipped or he won't follow) for the finishing cutscene.

steps.detail: Requires Icthlarin's Little Helper and Gertrude's Cat complete, plus The Giant Dwarf started for Keldagrim access. Your cat catches rats through five vignettes across the map: sneak it past guards in an Ardougne mansion to nab 6 rats, poison cheese to lure rats from a Varrock warehouse's holes, smoke a rat hole in Keldagrim with a lit weed pot, meet Felkrash in Port Sarim's rat pits, then learn animal charming from Ali the Snake Charmer in Pollnivneach (an 8-note sequence: D G E F# B(+octave) C# A) to finish.

steps.detail: Grish asks you to investigate zombified ogres (zogres) infesting the ogre ceremonial grounds. Head into the cave below Jiggig, being careful of disease from zogre/skogre attacks if under 89 combat (carry super restores). Loot a ruined backpack and a torn page from a skeleton/lectern, then pry open a coffin with a knife for a black prism. Head to Yanille, use the recovered Dragon Inn tankard on the bartender there, then visit Zavistic Rarve at the Wizards' Guild. Investigate the ogres' bedridden neighbor Sithik Ints: search his room for a portraiture book, necromancy book, papyrus/charcoal and a Book of 'H.A.M.', read and use all three on him, then sketch a portrait that reads as an honest "classic realist charcoal portrait" (higher Crafting speeds this up) and get it signed by the Dragon Inn bartender. Bring the necromancy book, H.A.M. book, tankard and signed portrait to Zavistic Rarve for a strange potion; spike Sithik's tea with it, then question him for the secrets to Relicym's balm, curing the disease, and removing the undead ogres. Return to Grish for an ogre gate key and to learn comp ogre bow use, then fight the level-111 Slash Bash (uses Ranged+Melee — safespot with Protect from Missiles, or use Crumble Undead) in the ceremonial chamber to finish.

steps.detail: Introductory miniquest gating the Vale Totems Fletching minigame. Talk to Ranulph, who shows you a totem the local ents damaged; child NPC Isadora tells you to rebuild it. Chop a nearby tree for oak-or-better logs, click the totem site to lay the new base, then return to Ranulph/Isadora. Next, click the totem and select carving options for a set of nearby spirit animals (randomized per player) to decorate it. Return again, then fletch 4 items (bows/shields) from the same wood as the totem and use them on the totem to finish decorating it. The ents leave an offering to collect, then speak to either NPC to receive Sacraments of ent folk and complete the miniquest, unlocking the minigame proper. No combat.

Myreque chain quest 3: cross into Meiyerditch via boat, meet Old Man Ral, run the sickle-logo agility maze to reach Vertida's hideout, then a fetch-quest loop back to Burgh de Rott and Paterdomus/Varrock before returning to sneak into the castle walls under Vanstrom Klause's nose (he attacks you 5x during the sketch cutscenes -- pray melee to no-damage it), then grab the alchemy tome from the secret lab with Telekinetic Grab. No combat kills required, just surviving Vanstrom's scripted hits.

Must beat 3 level-75 golems (white/grey/black), each weak to a different melee style (stab/slash/crush respectively) or a ranged/magic water-channel puzzle. Talk Awusah then Ghaslor the Elder for the ballad, find torn robe top+bottom in a cupboard, repair with needle+thread and equip (Robes of Elidinis), telegrab an ancestral key. Follow the river north to a waterfall cave, rope the overhanging root, use the ancestral key wearing the robes to open the door. Kill white golem (stab) then clear its water channel via Thieving; kill grey golem (slash) then clear via pickaxe; kill black golem (crush) then clear via Ranged/Magic on a target. Talk to a spirit through the north door, return to Nardah. Separately: take a genie's shoes by Awusah's door, knife them for a sole, find a crevice west of the general store, rope it, talk to and strike a deal with the Genie for a statuette, then place the statuette on the shrine plinth north of the fountain to finish. Region-opener (Nardah/desert), no known deeper dependency; useful all-purpose restoration shrine unlock.

steps.detail: Must be able to defeat a level 84 Fire Warrior of Lesarkus with Ranged. Choice quest with a good path (side with Guardians of Armadyl, kill Lucien level 14) or evil path (steal the Staff of Armadyl for Lucien, may need to kill a safespottable level 43 Guardian of Armadyl). Enter the temple dungeon south of the Ranging Guild; get boots of lightness from behind a web (needs light source+knife), equip Pendant of Lucien to pass the north gate, cross a lava bridge at -1kg or less, take a lever, cross back and attach the lever to a bracket then pull it, loot ice arrows from chests along an icy path (16 arrows enough with Ava's + 60 Ranged). Go back through the north gate, search-and-pull another lever (needs 42 Thieving), fight through to the Fire Warrior of Lesarkus (level 84, kill with ice arrows, Protect from Magic negates damage), then hand Winelda 20 unnoted limpwurt roots at once to be teleported across the lava (one-way, no going back - caution for ironmen). Optionally grab a shiny key for a dungeon shortcut. Push through to the Guardians of Armadyl room and pick a side to finish.

43 QP gate makes this a mid-game unlock, not an early one. Tell Juna stories to earn a stone bowl recipe, then use a light creature (attracted by the sapphire lantern) to cross the chasm to a rock vein, mine a magic stone, chisel it into a stone bowl, and hand it to Juna to finish. The sapphire lantern doubles as the light source needed to safely navigate the caves and is reusable later for While Guthix Sleeps. Gates While Guthix Sleeps and the Hard Lumbridge & Draynor Diary. Note: 'Tears of Guthix' the quest and 'Tears of Guthix' the repeatable minigame it unlocks are the same wiki title-root but two distinct pages -- cited both above since the depth:04 brief's long-run-value framing refers to the minigame, not the quest itself.

steps.detail: 4-stage fetch quest for Ava's device. Stage 1: talk to Ava, travel to undead chicken farm west of Ectofuntus, talk Alice/Malcolm loop, get crone-made amulet from old crone near Slayer Tower, give to Malcolm, buy 2 undead chickens w/ ecto-tokens. Stage 2: bring chickens + iron bars + hammer to Ava, get selected iron from Witch in manor, forge at Rimmington mine (face north), return magnet to Ava. Stage 3: cut undead tree (not dead tree) outside manor w/ mithril axe, see Turael in Burthorpe for Blessed axe (needs mithril axe + holy symbol), cut undead tree again for twigs, give to Ava, solve orb puzzle (toggle off all but 2nd/5th/9th left-to-right), combine solved notes + button + leather, hand in. Core reward is the Ava's device line feeding Ranged training.

steps.detail: Alan asks you to mind his egg-friend Humpy while he cooks a feast; gravity kills it the moment he leaves. Recruit three of King's men from The King's Inn in Tal Teklan to help rebuild the egg: Acatzin (repair blacksmith's whetstone then his axe), Nezketi (brew damiana tea: pick damiana leaves + bowl of water from fountain, boil on oven, pour into cup), Kauayotl (repair his cart with 2 planks, nails from blacksmith's workbench, hammer, saw from Archery Supplies). Back at the temple the three can't fix the original egg so you fetch three replacement eggs by killing and looting egg piles: large chicken (lvl16, chicken farm south of temple), red dragon (lvl106, Dragon Nest SE across the river, safespottable), black jaguar (lvl88, campsite east, safespot behind tropical tree/fern). None of the painted eggs survive judging (three more great falls), so you and King's men solve a sliding/rotate puzzle (hover puzzle-piece icon for the solution) to reassemble the original egg. Cutscene resolves the plot; ironically Alan himself then has a great fall. Avoid having a bonecrusher equipped if you want his bones as a keepsake instead of auto-crushed prayer xp.

The first death in Arceuus house in a thousand years needs investigating. Talk to Mori, report it to Councillor Andrews at Kourend Castle, then go to the Tower of Magic and fight through 5 Tormented Souls (level 16) to reach Asteros Arceuus upstairs. Travel to Mount Karuulm, talk to Kaal-Xil-Dar, then find an ancient grave SE of the mountain and follow a track (searching bushes/plants along the way) to a hidden Trapped Soul (level 30) and defeat it. Report back to Kaal-Xil-Dar, then search the rocks ringing the Dark Altar north of Arceuus to find and destroy a hidden device. Finish by talking to Lord Trobin Arceuus back at the Tower of Magic.

steps.detail: Novice Hunter-skill quest, no series. Charlie the zookeeper needs help finding huntsman Nickolaus, missing near Eagles' Peak west of the Tree Gnome Stronghold. Find his tent, pick up a bird book that drops a metal feather, and use it to open the mountain-top door into Eagles' Peak Dungeon. Shout to Nickolaus, trapped by a giant eagle, then craft two eagle costumes (10 eagle feathers + swamp tar + yellow dye + 50 coins at Varrock's Fancy Dress Shop) so you can both disguise as eagles. To open the eagle door to Nickolaus you first need three feathers: bronze (defeat a net trap via four corner winches), silver (Hunter 27 to read a pedestal trail leading to a hidden tunnel, then kill or threaten a level 13 kebbit), and gold (solve a bird-seed/lever puzzle moving eagle statues and wing-gates through a specific lever/feeder sequence, reset lever available if you mess it up). Use all three feathers on the eagle door, wear the disguise to pass the guard eagle, then learn to catch ferrets from Nickolaus (no box trap needed for this part) and deliver a ferret to Charlie at Ardougne Zoo to finish.

steps.detail: Only quest in the Penguin series. Zookeeper Larry is paranoid about penguins; build a bird-hide lookout on the Iceberg (oak plank + spade on a snow patch) and watch a cutscene of a unique-per-player 3-emote penguin greeting sequence (memorize it -- 8 possible emotes, needed later). Craft a Clockwork suit at a crafting table 3 (plank + silk + clockwork mechanism). Test it on zoo penguins using the memorized emote greeting (guessable if forgotten, max 24 tries) to learn they're planning to escape by flying; find more penguins disguised as sheep in Fred the Farmer's Lumbridge pasture, get a secret phrase ("do not trust the walrus") by trading a raw cod or wearing a ring of charos. Gather swamp tar + 5 feathers to trade black-marketeer Noodle for a fake KGP ID, then infiltrate the Iceberg outpost with the password "cabbage", complete the Penguin Agility Course, and steal a cowbell + craft Penguin Bongos (mahogany plank + leather) to distract the guards Ping and Pong and open the war room. Get caught by Pescaling Pax and thrown in an Icelord cage (level 51, kill 1-3, each grants 40 Attack xp) to escape, then report the penguin invasion plan back to Larry.

steps.detail: Intermediate. Sanfew sends you to Eadgar atop Trollheim for goutweed, but troll cook Burntmeat won't hand it over without a 'human' to cook. Eadgar's trick: steal and drug a parrot (vodka+pineapple chunks) from Ardougne Zoo, hide it near the troll prison rack, then supply grain/logs/tinderbox/raw chicken/pestle-and-mortar plus a dirty robe from Tegid (Taverley lake) so Eadgar builds a fake man; separately brew a troll truth potion (find a troll thistle near Eadgar's cave, dry+grind it, mix into an unf ranarr potion at Herblore 31) so Burntmeat can't lie about the recipe. Trade the fake man to Burntmeat for the storeroom key, dodge patrolling troll guards via safespots to grab one Goutweed (grab 2 extra if planning Dream Mentor/Dragon Slayer II), hand it to Sanfew. Resolves the Trollheim-teleport branch of unlock-gwd (steer item 133, boots-vs-tele choice) by granting the Trollheim Teleport spell as an alternative to the Agility 44/47 Burthorpe-route shortcuts.

steps.detail: Talk to Bert in Yanille (house next to the POH portal) to get a sandy hand. Buy/bring a beer and give it to the Guard Captain at the Dragon Inn pub south of Bert's house. Ring the bell outside the Wizards' Guild (or enter with 66 Magic) and give the hand to Zavistic Rarve. Get Bert's rota from Bert, travel to Brimhaven, find Sandy south of the Shrimp and Parrot restaurant, search his desk for Sandy's rota, and pickpocket him for sand. Back in Yanille, get a magic scroll from Bert, ring the bell for a magical orb from Zavistic Rarve, who then offers to teleport you to Port Sarim. At Betty's magic shop get bottled water, mix in redberries then white berries (order matters) for pink dye, dye the lantern lens for a rose-tinted lens, then use the lens on the counter from the doorway for a truth serum, and hand over sand. In Brimhaven, distract Sandy with dialogue and use the truth serum on his coffee mug, then activate the magical orb and click through every dialogue option with him. Back in Yanille, ring the bell twice more at the Wizards' Guild (getting a cutscene on the second), sail to Entrana and talk to Mazion at the sandpit for a wizard's head, then return to Yanille and ring the bell/talk to Zavistic Rarve one last time to finish.

steps.detail: Firemaking 45 is listed as a requirement but is not actually needed in practice (only used to identify brazier fuel by inspection; trial-and-error works without it). Build a statue for Lazim from 32kg sandstone base + 20kg sandstone body (chiseled down from bigger pieces), pick a head design, carve it from a 5kg granite piece, hand it over and fall into a buried temple. Bottom floor: chisel a fallen statue for 4 limbs, collect M/R/K/Z sigils by walking the outer hallway rooms (limbs auto-consumed to open each door), place all 4 sigils in the center room. Middle floor: mold soft clay + carved 5kg granite into a new stone head for the pedestal (triggers cutscene), then solve 4 corner puzzles - feed food to Pentyn (NW), cast a wind spell on the furnace (NE), light 6 braziers with correct fuel per item (SE), cast a fire spell on the fountain (SW) - to pass the magic barrier. Top floor: cast Crumble Undead on a boneguard, then Protect-from-Melee-tank while talking to a second boneguard, patch a wall with 3 sandstone pieces (chisel each into place) to finish. Region-opener quest, no known deeper dependency; unlocks quick desert-temple teleport infrastructure via Camulet.

REMOVED FROM THE GAME on 10 January 2024 (Children of the Sun update), alongside the entire Kourend Favour system -- this miniquest can no longer be started or completed by any account, live or otherwise; the page documents legacy content only. When it existed: task was to reach 100% favour in all 5 Great Kourend houses (Arceuus/Hosidius/Lovakengj/Piscarilius/Shayzien) via each house's favour activities (library assistance, ploughing/fertiliser, sulphur mining, fishing-crane repair/sandworm hunting, infirmary/crime-fighting), each of which also had its own house-specific sub-quest that granted a favour bump. Given the removal, do not schedule this as live-game work; retained here only because the depth:04 bundle explicitly named it.

Must be able to beat level-68 Gorad (safespottable) and run past level-111 blue dragons. Flow: talk to Wizard in tower, get fingernails from bush below, talk to Og NW of Yanille for Toban's key, rope across to Jangerberry island (talk Grew), enter Tunnel to Toban south of Gu'Tanoth, kill Gorad for tooth, give Toban dragon bones for relic part 3, loot chest, return relics to Wizard for ogre relic. Enter Gu'Tanoth, steal rock cake from market, pay 20 coins/talk guards to reach Skavid caves, get skavid map (death rune), solve 4-cave skavid word-repeat puzzle, gold bar unlocks east gate, second nightshade in Mad Skavid cave, use nightshade on Enclave guard to trigger cutscene. Brew magic ogre potion (guam unf + jangerberries + ground bat bones, in that order) with Wizard. Return to Enclave, potion 6 ogre shamans for crystal 3, mine Rock of Dalgroth for crystal 4, return all 4 crystals to correct pillar colors (NE magenta/SE grey/SW yellow/NW cyan), pull lever. Key spine value: unlocks Ogre Enclave blue dragons + Watchtower teleport infrastructure.

Pure dialogue miniquest, no combat/skilling: visit Dimintheis's three sons in any order (Avan at Al Kharid mine, Caleb in Catherby, Johnathon at the Jolly Boar Inn) who each turn down help with a comic non-problem, then return to Dimintheis, who reveals the family isn't actually rich and asks for 500,000gp instead. Hand over the coins to finish. The real payoff is the gauntlet-duplication unlock, since normally only one gauntlet type can be held/enchanted at a time.

Endgame of the goblin questline (Zanik's destiny to find Yu'biusk). Disguise as a goblin using a Makeover Mage transformation + a goblin potion (toadflax unf + pharmakos berries) to infiltrate the Goblin Temple, free Zanik from a prison cell using a Dorgesh-kaan sphere, then pass High Priest Bighead's goblin-lore quiz. Steal 6 coloured keys (black/white/yellow/purple/orange/blue) from priests by repeatedly re-dyeing a goblin mail and pickpocketing -- requires a side trip to Hemenster's Fishing Contest area to catch a whitefish for Aggie in exchange for the white mail. Unlock the crypt with all 6 keys and defeat 4 named goblin-ancestor bosses (Snothead, Snailfeet, Mosschin, Redeyes) then the level-184 Strongbones (skoblins present, Protect from Magic) to learn Yu'biusk's location. Return to Oldak in Dorgesh-Kaan's South Dungeon, dial combination 9-4-1 on his machine, and open the strange box in Yu'biusk to finish.

steps.instruction: Complete Curse of the Empty Lord
steps.detail: After Valdez, the game randomly assigns one of 3 fixed sequences (told via a location hint -- 'pirates and a shipwreck'=Seq1, 'north-east'=Seq2, 'south-east'=Seq3) and you must follow that sequence's 5 ghosts (Rennard/Kharrim/Lennissa/Dhalak/Viggora) in order at THAT sequence's specific locations only -- the same ghosts exist at all 3 sequences' spots but only respond in your assigned one. Multiple stops are deep/dangerous Wilderness (up to level 56, e.g. Rogues' Castle in Seq1, Edgeville Dungeon in Seq3). Robes are individually reclaimable for free afterward by revisiting your sequence's ghosts.

Sequel to Fight Arena. Fully equip ghostly robes + ring of visibility + ghostspeak amulet, then talk to General Khazard's ghost south-east of Rellekka. He sends you to pay Sin Seer 40 coins in Seers' Village (upstairs in the spinning-wheel house), then relay word to 4 ghost scouts scattered across the map (south of Shantay Pass, south of the Gnome Stronghold entrance, between Falador and Draynor Manor, east of Tai Bwo Wannai) -- each just needs a conversation, no combat. Report back to Khazard, then enter the Goblin Cave east of the Fishing Guild carrying the severed leg, run to the north-east crack in the southern wall (a no-Prayer zone), and fight the level-160 ghost of Bouncer to 0 hp, which auto-throws the leg to finish. Auto-completes if the Fremennik or Desert league region is unlocked in a Leagues context.

Flesh Crawlers or Slayer tasks. Unlocks dragon and barrows armour.

steps.detail: Lobsters at Karamja or Catherby. Stocking food for combat.

Six independent skill lessons taught by Otto Godblessed, doable in any order, each ending by reporting success back to him: (1) heavy-rod fishing - search the barbarian bed for a rod, catch a leaping fish, dissect it for roe; (2) barehanded fishing - catch at any harpoon spot with no tool; (3) firemaking with a bow - use logs on the bow per a level table, then (advanced) kill mithril dragons for chewed bones and build/light a funeral pyre ship; (4) farming - bare-hand-plant a seed, then plant a sapling by smashing its pot; (5) smithing - forge one bronze spear then one bronze hasta at the barbarian anvil, asking Otto between each; (6) herblore - use roe on a 2-dose attack potion to brew a barbarian potion. Unlocks are used throughout later Barbarian-series content (Scorpion Catcher, Horror from the Deep, Rag and Bone Man II bank access via mithril-dragon farming).
Green dragonhide bodies for fast XP. Buy from GE.
Canifis Rooftop Course. Highest marks/hr early-mid game.
Dragon bones on guilded altar. Unlocks Protect from Missiles.
Chinchompas at the Piscatoris Hunter Area. Good XP and GP.

Speak to Guildmaster Apatura and Guild Scribe Verity in the tree-basement of the Hunters' Guild, then get a toy mouse from Guild Hunter Wolf and use it to distract Guild Hunter Kiko so you can check his cat bed. Go help injured Guild Hunter Fox south-east of the guild near the mine: pick a leaf from a leafy bush near him, pick a second leaf at Locus Oasis, and catch 2 embertailed jerboas with a box trap for their tails, then combine a tail with the leaves into a makeshift poultice and give it to Fox. Visit Atza near the southern gate of Civitas illa Fortis, set up a pile of equipment (hammer available nearby) for her, and receive trimmed fur in return. Return the trimmed fur/report to Fox, deliver his report to Guild Scribe Verity, fix Kiko's cat bed with the spare jerboa tail, and report to Guildmaster Apatura to finish. No combat required.

steps.detail: Maple trees at Seers' Village or Corsair Cove. Higher XP rate.

Investigate the disgraced Councillor Sophia Hughes' escape for Commander Fullore and Martin Holt. Search a house for a receipt, question Tomas Lawry and the Lovakengj pub owner Fuggy, then a cutscene at Veos's boat in Port Piscarilius drops you straight into a fight with the level-168 demon Judge of Yama (dodge fire waves like Galvek, melee him in the gaps, he prays overhead the whole fight). Pickpocket Istoria and search a case in the Arceuus Library for Rose's diary and a hidden note, then chase Rose's trail: solve a stone-pile numeric code at the Forthos Ruins, fight off an assassin and melt an ice panel with a fire spell at the Settlement Ruins, and match statue-panel order at The Legless Faun in Piscarilius, ending at a shack trapdoor near the Farming Guild. Head into Molch's Lizard dwelling to see Khat B'alam, retrieve a lizardman egg from Kebos Swamp (a level-75 lizardman brute attacks but doesn't need to be killed) to trade for a key, then fight the spirit boss Xamphur (239, Protect from Magic, kill summoned hands, dodge falling-hand mechanic Vorkath-style). Visit all five Kourend house Lords/Ladies at their home locations, then again at Xeric's Lookout to gather their support. Finish by brewing a sulphur potion (defence potion + volcanic sulphur) enchanted by Kaal-Mej-San at Mount Karuulm into a shielding potion for the Doors of Dinh, defeat a level-91 Barbarian Warlord in the Kourend Woodland, collect a declaration from Jorra in the Graveyard of Heroes (kill a level-132 assassin), craft a dark essence block (pickaxe+chisel a dense runestone near the Dark Altar, use on the Dark Altar) to trade Mori for a dark nullifier, retrieve a Shayzien journal from a lockpicked chest in the Hosidius Vinery, then report back to all five Lords and Commander Fullore at Xeric's Lookout for the final cutscenes.

Help a shipwrecked Fremennik reclaim his family honour: chop a windswept tree for logs, recruit his relatives in Rellekka, then run a treasure-trail-style dungeon under the tree with a symbol-picture-wall combination lock and a rope-repaired rotten walkway, killing skeleton fremennik (40) for keys before finishing off Ulfric (level 100, melee, safespottable) in an old ship.

steps.detail: 3-tick Granite in Kharidian Desert quarry for fast XP (requires waterskins/humidify).

Requires a second player as a partner from the OPPOSITE Shield of Arrav gang (Black Arm vs Phoenix) for a cooperative candlestick-theft sequence in Brimhaven - cannot be soloed. 3 independent fetch chains converge at Achietties: (1) Lava eel - get blamish snail slime from Gerrant in Port Sarim, mix into harralander(unf) for blamish oil, oil your fishing rod, travel to Taverley Dungeon (get dusty key from Velrak after killing the Jailer, or use 70 Agility shortcut, or 60 Sailing route via Charred Dungeon) and fish+cook one lava eel near the blue dragons. (2) Master thieves' armband - Black Arm partner talks Trobert in Brimhaven (password "Four leaved clover"), gets Miscellaneous key from Grip, passes it to Phoenix partner who navigates Brimhaven's food shop/secret wall panel (password "Gherkin" with Straven in Varrock) to lock Grip in a room; Black Arm partner then kills/traps Grip, loots 2 candlesticks from a chest, trades 1 to the Phoenix partner - each turns in a candlestick to their own gang leader (Katrine/Straven) for the armband. (3) Fire feather - get Ice Gloves by killing the level-111 Ice Queen inside White Wolf Mountain (ladder/tunnel maze north side), then travel to Entrana and kill the Firebird near the Law Altar for its feather. Hand in all three (eel, armband, feather) to Achietties. High spine value: hard-gates Legends' Quest and unlocks dragon weapon purchase infrastructure.

steps.detail: Gate quest into the Miscellania kingdom-management minigame. Requires the Heroes' Quest chain (Shield of Arrav, Lost City, Merlin's Crystal, Dragon Slayer I) plus The Fremennik Trials. Choose to woo either Princess Astrid (give flowers, dance emote, later a bow, then blow-kiss emote, then a ring) or Prince Brand (give flowers, clap/cheer emote, a cake, then blow-kiss emote, then a ring) through several rounds of agreeable dialogue until they call you 'dear'. Ferry an anthem and treaty back and forth between the two royal siblings (advisor Ghrim fixes a bad anthem), forge a giant pen from an iron bar via blacksmith Derrik, then grind favour from 25% to 75% by buying flowers / raking herbs+flax outside the castle / mining coal / chopping maples / fishing near the docks (world-hopping regrows weeds faster) before reporting back to Vargas.
Falador or Seers' Rooftop. Unlock shortcut network for efficient traversal.

Agility 56 is only needed to avoid a slower alternate route through the traps (not a hard start gate); must also defeat a safespottable level 110 Tyras guard. Flow: return through the Underground Pass (west West-Ardougne entrance) to Iban's Temple exit, run west through Isafdar meeting Idris then Lord Iorwerth at the Iorwerth Camp, track the Elf Tracker to find/kill the Tyras guard for a crystal pendant, collect coal-tar barrels + sulphur, gather quicklime/naphtha ingredients and distill naphtha at the Rimmington chemist's still (careful tar/pressure/coal-feed minigame), assemble a barrel bomb (quicklime+sulphur+naphtha+cloth), carry it back through the Underground Pass to the catapult north of Tyras Camp, bait the guard with cooked rabbit and fire the bomb to destroy Lord Iorwerth's target, then return to King Lathas to finish. Directly prerequisite for Roving Elves and the rest of the Mourner/elf storyline.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Investigate Menaphos's lockdown for the Al Kharid spy Maisa at her campsite east of Sophanem (reachable after quest-start via fairy ring AKP or a Communed Pharaoh's sceptre). Defeat the level-174 Head Menaphite Guard at the blocked Jaltevas Pyramid entrance without Protect from Melee (it deals 1/3 max HP through the prayer). At the Ruins of Ullek, light a furnace with coal, dig up a passcode-locked chest (1118513), craft and place a scarab emblem on a pillar (facing pincers-up), then fight through two level-119 Scarab Mages and disable timed lever traps in a corridor maze. Solve the Riddle of the Tomb by matching per-player emblem clues (item/god order) to the correct urns, then grab a rusty key from the spirit's room. Use ranged to fight the level-379 Champion of Scabaras (alternates magic/melee — stay at range, destroy its 20hp Shadow Rift fast, kill its poison-swarm summon quickly, avoid its 4-tile Shadow Burst). At Nardah, feed a crocodile at the River Elid to retrieve a Lily of the Elid, then help Zahur balance her chemistry-heat puzzle (max the middle/right bars, halve the right, lower the middle to finish) for a pox cure to deliver to the High Priest in Sophanem. Finally return to the necropolis and defeat the level-351 Menaphite Akh (melee; dodge her lightning-bolt twitch attack by standing behind/beside her; kill her summoned Menaphite Shadow quickly or it can swap places with her) to complete the quest.

steps.detail: Agility 56 is waived if travelling to the elven woods by charter ship instead of on foot. Must also be able to defeat a level 84 Moss Guardian unarmed under heavy item restrictions (flinchable). Flow: track down and befriend Islwyn (world-hop if not present), bank combat gear, use Glarial's pebble on Glarial's tombstone NW of the Fishing Guild, kill the Moss Guardian for a consecration seed, then travel through the Waterfall Dungeon (raft+rope+rope+door) to plant the seed in the final room and report back to Islwyn for the reward choice. Directly sets up Mourning's End Part I's teleport crystal if Eluned is then spoken to.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Also requires ability to beat a level 11 Mourner with combat stats set to 20 each (kills all stats incl. HP to 20 on contact -- ring of dueling to Ferox pool of refreshment recommended afterward). Flow: talk Eluned then Arianwyn in Lletya, kill a Mourner at the Arandar gate and loot its 7-piece outfit. Clean the bloody mourner top with Tegid's stolen soap + bucket of water at Taverley. Mend trousers with silk+bear fur via Oronwen in Lletya (buy dyes here). Don full mourner gear, enter West Ardougne Mourner HQ, free/befriend the caged gnome downstairs with feather+leather+magic log+toad crunchies. Re-dye 4 sheep herds (Feldip Hills or Castle Wars swamp toads dyed via ogre bellows) using the fixed device's Aim-and-Fire mode on the coloured sheep north of East Ardougne. Make a barrel of toxic powder (naphtha + rotten apple mush via sieve, cooked on a range not fire) and poison 2 of West Ardougne's food stores, then report to Essyllt and Arianwyn to finish. Sets up Mourning's End Part II (teleport crystal) and unlocks the Death Altar chain via that sequel.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: No hard skill requirement, but 65+ combat, 75-91 Agility (higher = fewer obstacle failures), and 43+ Prayer are strongly recommended for the shadow-infested temple. Flow: in mourner gear, get the new key from Essyllt, traverse a cave to reach the Temple of Light, chip a piece off a black crystal and have Arianwyn enchant it. Re-enter the temple and solve a 3-floor light/mirror puzzle across 5 numbered treasure chests plus a final Death Altar puzzle -- each chest step repositions hand mirrors and coloured crystals (yellow/cyan/blue/fractured) to route a light beam to unlock the next chest, ultimately opening a path to the Death Altar. Ironmen without a death talisman must instead collect 50 junk items to open the Death Altar route. Charge the enchanted crystal at the Death Altar, then use it on the black crystal to finish and return to Arianwyn.

steps.detail: Blue/red dragonhide bodies for faster XP, higher material cost.

Long multi-stage quest gating the Lunar spellbook (key teleport/utility infrastructure). Get seal of passage from Brundt the Chieftain, sail to Lunar Isle with Captain Bentley (talk to 5 crew NPCs in strict order, then find 5 hidden symbols with a lit lantern around the ship). On Lunar Isle: kill Suqah (safespottable, lvl 111) for a tooth, brew a waking-sleep potion for Baba Yaga/Oneiromancer. Charge a Dramen staff at all 4 elemental altars (air/fire/water/earth, in order) to make a Lunar staff, hand to Oneiromancer. Mine+smelt lunar ore into a lunar helm; solve Pauline Polaris name-guess dialogue; kill more Suqah for a special tiara + 4 hides, tan hides, craft full lunar gear (torso/trousers/gloves/boots); dig up blue flowers west of the two bridges for the lunar ring; give the Oneiromancer all lunar gear then get it back. Enter the Dream World: light ceremonial brazier with waking-sleep-soaked kindling, then complete 6 mini-puzzles at colored platforms (dice-sum guessing, number-sequence pattern, 20-log chopping race, memorize-and-cross a Dream Puffs stepping-stone maze, hurdle race, copy-the-emote) before fighting and killing Me (level 79, safespottable, no gear switching allowed once in the dream, can't teleport out). Return via lectern to Lunar Isle, hand in seal of passage to Oneiromancer to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Master-difficulty Fremennik/Lunar quest, ability to defeat 4 powerful monsters without prayer required. Find Cyrisus collapsed in the Lunar Isle mine and raise his health/spirit/armament stat bars: feed him 3 food types in the same repeated order (7-7-6 split) for health, talk positively to raise spirit, and guess-and-check his ideal armour set via the bank ('Birds-Eye' Jack) confirmed with the NPC Contact spell (set varies by dominant combat style: melee/ranged/magic). Once all stats hit 100%, escort him to the Oneiromancer near the Astral Altar, brew a dream potion (goutweed + water-filled dream vial + a crushed hammered-astral-rune reagent), then enter the Dream Hall and light the brazier to fight, in sequence and without prayer, The Inadequacy (343, hardest, magic recommended), The Everlasting (223, safespottable west of the lectern), The Untouchable (274, safespottable), and The Illusive (108, burrows and relocates). The lectern at the north of the arena is the ONLY way to leave -- all teleports including ring of life are disabled, and dying here is a real hardcore-ironman-ending death. Return to the Oneiromancer afterward (keep the seal of passage) to finish.

Slayer or NMZ.

Deep prerequisite quest chain (effectively requires Merlin's Crystal, Murder Mystery, Rune Mysteries, Druidic Ritual line too). Flow: at Sinclair Mansion, break in via smashed east window, grab scrap paper + address form + black knight helm from bookcase, give all 3 to guard then talk Gossip. Travel to Seers' Village courthouse for Anna's Trial: call Dog Handler (ask about poison), Butler (ask about dagger), Maid (ask about night of murder + thread) as witnesses via the Judge to get her declared not guilty. At Camelot Castle statue: cutscene, then free Merlin from his cell (reach vent, Telekinetic Grab a guard's hair clip or take a knight's lockpick, solve a 4-tumbler lock puzn - raise each tumbler until it shows green, keep raising the rest), climb to top floor and pick the round purple box. At Black Knights' Fortress (west of Edgeville): get an Animate rock scroll from Wizard Cromperty in Ardougne first, wear full black armour to enter through the south sturdy door, push the north wall, climb down, free King Arthur from his statue using granite, give him the bronze med helm + iron chainbody, then report to King Arthur at Camelot's round table to finish. Big spine value: unlocks Knight Waves -> Chivalry/Piety prayers, a broadly-used combat prayer tier.

steps.detail: Not a Quest-List miniquest -- it's a members-only Activity/training-ground gated by a quest (King's Ransom), listed on the Miniquests page's 'one-off content without miniquest designation' table (Length=Long there) rather than under 'List of miniquests'. Fight 8 increasingly tough knights (level 110-127) in sequence, Melee-only (no Prayer/Ranged/Magic allowed in the room), each draining a specific combat stat on hit; progress is saved on death/teleport (resume at the knight that killed you) but resets to wave 1 only if you leave via the door. A flinch-behind-the-training-dummy strategy is the commonly cited safe/cheap method; Guthan's set or straightforward gear-and-food both also work at 65+ combat stats. Confirmed safe death for solo Hardcore Ironman (not safe for Hardcore Group Ironman).

Motherload Mine for passive gold nugget accumulation and equipment upgrades.
Ardougne Rooftop (best marks) or Werewolf Course. Graceful recolor at 260 marks.

Find-the-book miniquest: the target book spawns on a random bookshelf in Arceuus Library each playthrough (a third-party client's book-search helps narrow it down); reading it points to Aretha at the Soul Altar, who sends you to dig in the Arceuus church crypt for a damaged soul bearer, then to the Key Master in Cerberus' Lair (Taverley Dungeon) to repair it. Lost soul bearers are freely re-obtainable by digging the crypt again.
Red chinchompas at Feldip Hills or Maniacal Monkeys post-MM2 for best XP.
Blackjack Menaphite thugs or Master Farmers at 38+ for seeds.
Fletch oak shortbows (u). Buy logs from GE.
Tasks from Mazchna (Morytania requires Priest in Peril) or Vannaka.

steps.instruction: Complete Rag and Bone Man II
steps.detail: Sprawling sequel to Rag and Bone Man I gated behind 40 Slayer, 20 Defence, and several partial/full quest completions (Skippy and the Mogres, Horror from the Deep/Fremennik Trials, Creature of Fenkenstrain, Waterfall Quest). Kill 27 varied monsters worldwide (bats, undead cows, werewolves, ghouls, zombies, moss giants, jackals, desert lizards, vultures, ice giants, mogres, snakes, jogres, baby blue dragons, trolls, rabbits, basilisks (needs mirror shield), dagannoths, fire giants, terrorbirds, wolves, ogres, zogres, etc.) for their bones, then repeat the vinegar-soak-and-boil process from part I 27 times at the Odd Old Man's hut. Ironmen/leaguers should avoid starting until ready since quest-specific bones can litter drop tables across five regions while active.

steps.detail: Bandage and rescue the injured tortugan Floopa (seaweed + palm leaf from a shaken palm tree = bandage); she boards your boat and directs you to the Great Conch. Speak to Elder Raley in the village for a repair list, then gather materials around town (saw, hammer, 6 tortugan scutes, 10 jatoba logs chopped from jatoba trees, 6 sea shells on the beach) and fix six structures (Elder Krill's stall + store wall, Elder Strom's store wall + crate, Elder Coco's stall + crate). Track a gryphon from footprints at the market's central monument, following the trail through inspectable objects (flowers, rockslides, plants) to a cave; clear roots with an axe and kill the level-95 gryphon inside. Elder Blunn then gives a Tortugan shield (cape slot, must stay equipped) before sailing to The Little Pearl to fight the level-235 Shellbane Gryphon — use Protect from Melee/Ranged, ranged/magic negates a mechanic, its charge knockback (up to 65 dmg) is blocked by standing near a tree/eggs, step off tiles when whirlwinds spawn on wing-flap warning. After the fight, talk to Korel about a mysterious ship before returning to Elder Raley to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Dungeon-crawl sequel to Haunted Mine. Fastest entry is a Slayer ring teleport straight to Tarn's Lair (skips the whole trap gauntlet); otherwise walk in via the Haunted Mine cave and navigate floor/wall/log traps and receding-wall pits (search to disarm; log traps re-arm if you fall) to reach a banker (100gp/use, last restock point) then on to Tarn's chamber. Fight: Tarn transforms into a level-69 mutant with two level-110 terror dogs and nearby level-53 animated armour; Protect from Melee, ignore the dogs/armour (only Tarn needs to die), watch for continuous prayer drain. After the mutant form dies he becomes an easier level-69 ghost (poison carries over between forms). Read Tarn's diary in the next room to finish; enchant salve amulets with it afterward at leisure.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Talk to Prince Itzla Arkan at the Teomat, then again after the cutscene. Travel to Quetzacalli Gorge, rent the pub's basement room from the bartender for 30 coins, rest on the bed in the SE room, talk to the Prince, then ask the general store shopkeeper for help and return to talk to the Prince again in the room. Head north through the gate to the Tower of Ascension, talk to the Prince outside, chat with recruits Nova/Sergius/Felius/Caritta, talk to the Prince again (no pets following), then enter the tower and talk to Forebearer Janus to climb up. First Trial: pickpocket a caged Emissary Ascended for a tower key, loot two chests for a book/paper via a word-decode puzzle unique per player, read a resulting poem, and speak the derived passcode to Forebearer Janus on the same floor (don't go downstairs mid-trial or it resets). Second Trial: a wave-based combat encounter where you must heal Prince Itzla with bandages from medical boxes while fighting melee/mage waves. Third Trial: question every cultist and accuse whichever one mentions 'Mictl' (heretical, not part of Emissary beliefs). Final Trial: fight Prince Itzla himself (level ~unlisted) — pray melee against basics, re-enable prayer immediately after his sword-swipe special (which disables it), and run behind him when he telegraphs his AOE special; he's immune to special attacks (unequip a Scythe of Vitur and punch/kick instead). Loot Twilight Emissary robes from a chest, equip them, bring the Prince through the temple east, then descend into the ruins south into an Ice Dungeon: mine through rocks, pull 4 levers scattered through icy rooms while dodging Frost Nagua/frost crabs/traps (each trap deals 10 damage), then pull a chain for future shortcut access. Statue Puzzle: collect 3 coloured icons from urns (level-104 Frost Nagua spawn continuously, Protect from Magic negates their hits), fix broken statues with the icons, then read corner murals to learn a player-specific activation order (Zema/Oma/Yeya/Naui = 1-4) and touch statues in that order to open the frozen door. Final Boss: fight Amoxliatl (level 263) praying magic, avoiding ice pools/spikes, re-enabling Protect from Magic after it's disabled, and meleeing the healing ice blocks she summons (or ignoring them at high level and just maging her). Finish by speaking to Servius, Teokan of Ralos, at the Sunrise Palace.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: The dwarven town Cam Torum's underground temple Neypotzli has stirred 3 sealed ancient bosses. Kill a Sulphur Nagua guarding the entrance, enter the city, and meet Jessamine, Attala, Zuma. Build 3 camps in the dungeon's corner areas (Ancient Prison, Streambound Cavern, Earthbound Cavern) using building supplies. Get water and earth talismans from Attala, have them infused (magic shop's Nahta, then the blacksmith), then dowse hot/cold with both talismans to locate the hidden NPC Eyatlalli (location varies per player). Gather 3 ritual items around the dungeon (moonlight grub paste, bream scales from fishing, a trapped moss lizard's tail) and start the ritual. Fight all 3 Moons of Peril in their own chambers: Blue Moon (crush-weak; weapon-freeze and brazier-relight specials), Blood Moon (slash-weak; raining-blood pools and blood-jaguar specials), Eclipse Moon (stab-weak; rotating shield and clone-facing specials) -- stand in a rotating safe-damage circle throughout, damage during specials still counts. Return to the Antechamber and speak to Eyatlalli to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Missing-persons mystery in Auburnvale. Read the pub noticeboard, talk to Marcus, the Bartender, Ictus, and Captain Ariadna, then to Francis/Aemilia about their missing children. Follow red marks west to the river, fish cloth from a floating plank, then follow a trail of puddles around the mountain to a cave holding an injured boy. Bring 4 willow longbows to Captain Ariadna and reinforce the house's west wall with 4 maple logs + a hammer, then talk to the now-rescued kids upstairs. Return to the cave, talk to Antos, and fight 3 Strange Creatures (level 93 -- their bleed still ticks through Protect from Melee). Report back to Captain Ariadna to finish and unlock the Stalker Den.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Myreque chain quest 4: infiltrate Ver Sinhaza via steam-vent parkour to spy on the vampyres, brew truth potions to interrogate a captive, forge the Ivandis flail (emerald sickle + enchant + chain), then fight Ranis Drakan (level 233, melee-only damage via the flail, 3 phases including summoned vyrewatch and a berserk finale). Notably hard boss relative to the quest's skill reqs -- 60+ melee and 43+ Prayer recommended despite low stated requirements.

Second Miscellania-series quest. As regent, investigate thefts threatening war between Miscellania and Etceteria; talking to citizens on both sides reveals soldiers demanded tithes and were refused. King Vargas sends you to the Sailor at the docks, who mentions visiting children; get a signed scroll from Vargas to access the dungeon under Miscellania Castle. Talk to the dwarf Donal, then repair a broken lift using an engine + 5 coal, 3 beams, 3 pulley beams and 2 ropes assembled in a specific order. Deeper in, swing across water with a rope, cross slippery rocks with a plank (avoid steam vents and falling rocks), and collect 5 pages of a burnt diary from fire remains, reading it before the final crevice. Meet the runaway Fremennik-trial children (a Scooby-Doo parody) who admit to staging the whole conflict, then kill the Giant Sea Snake (level 149, 100 HP, poison hits up to 9 -- antipoison strongly recommended) in an instanced boss room. Collect the heavy box it drops, then deliver a letter from Queen Sigrid to King Vargas to finish. reqs.quests is the fully flattened chain from the page's own Details template (Throne of Miscellania requires Heroes' Quest which requires Shield of Arrav+Lost City+Merlin's Crystal+Dragon Slayer I, plus The Fremennik Trials).

steps.detail: Experienced-tier sequel to The Eyes of Glouphrie. Expose King Bolren's new pet 'Dumpling' as another evil creature via Yewnock's value-matching disc machine, found through a monolith-pushing puzzle in the Tree Gnome Village Dungeon and Bolrie's diary cutscenes recounting gnome political history. Track down explorer Longramble in the Galarpos Mountains and heal the corrupted spirit tree Incomitatus with a crystal chime (unlocking it as a teleport), then race through the Warped Depths dungeon past aggressive Warped Terrorbirds and kill three of them before Hazelmere teleports you to safety from a tar-and-gas trap. Required for: While Guthix Sleeps.

steps.instruction: Complete A Night at the Theatre
steps.detail: The Mysterious Stranger wants Lady Verzik Vitur humiliated. Kill a vyrewatch below the Theatre for a key, unlock a gate and loot a coffin for Ranis' head, then head to a cave north of Darkmeyer to find an egg sac guarded by venomous spiders (bring anti-venom/antipoison) — get sulphuric acid from Daer Krand in the Sisterhood Sanctuary (south of Slepe graveyard) and pour it on the egg sac for strange spider eggs (no need to kill the spiders). With a ghostspeak amulet or Morytania legs 2+, visit the Nature Spirit at the Nature Grotto (fairy ring BIP), then cross to the island east of Mort Myre Swamp (north of the Shades of Mort'ton entrance) to kill the level-302 hespori and chop it for hespori bark. Deliver both trophies to the Mysterious Stranger, then complete one Theatre of Blood raid (any mode; entry mode recommended, skippable if you already have a completion) and report back to finish.

Maple trees, watermelons, herb patches every 80 minutes.
Required for RFD Pirate Pete. Moderate quest on Braindeath Island.

steps.instruction: Complete Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
steps.detail: Second Fairy Tale-series quest. Wait for Martin's crops to fail again (~5.5 min logged-in time), then investigate in Zanaris: find Fairy Nuff's ransacked grotto and pick up Nuff's certificate, decipher its fairy-symbol code by reading the Cosmic Altar's rune temple sign in Zanaris. Get permission from the Fairy Godfather to use fairy rings and learn the network from the Co-ordinator/Fairy Fixit. Use a 4-code fairy ring sequence (AIR, DLR, DJQ, AJS) with Nuff's certificate in inventory to reach the Fairy Queen's hideout, where Fairy Nuff explains the dying queen needs her stolen magic secateurs back. Pickpocket the Fairy Godfather (Thieving 40, no boost) for the Queen's secateurs, deliver them to Fairy Nuff, then brew a magic essence potion from a star flower (grown on the CKP cosmic plane, Farming 49) and gorak claw powder (killed from level 145 Goraks on the DIR gorak plane, Herblore 57 to combine). Use the potion on the Fairy Queen to revive her; she ultimately decides to let the Godfather keep the throne for now given his numerical advantage.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Master quest, no series, heavy fairy-tale references. Collector Sylas wants two rare items for his magic beans: a feather from the griffin Grimgnash on White Wolf Mountain (tell him an escalating violent bedtime story via specific dialogue options or take 20% current HP damage) and a helmet from dwarf Rupert, imprisoned in a tower between Goblin Village and Ice Mountain. Climb the tower's crumbling east wall (Thieving 58) to reach Rupert, then climb his lowered beard (Agility 59) to talk to him; Princess Miazrqa will free him only if you retrieve her pendant, stolen by a mouse and hidden in the Witch's House basement behind an electric-shocking gate (leather gloves avoid 17 damage) and a piano puzzle (play notes EFEDCAEGA). Shrink with a herblore-brewed potion (Herblore 52) to enter the mouse hole, navigate nail-wall ladders past level 95 mice to the pendant, then trade it to Miazrqa for Rupert's helmet. Give both items to Sylas for magic beans, plant them near Taverley's tree patch, then climb the fast-growing beanstalk (Agility 59, no followers allowed) to fight Glod, a level 118-to-138 cloud giant weak to Magic who quakes to drain Prayer and heals himself. Loot includes a golden goblin and gems; use the spare shrinking potion on the beanstalk then chop it down (Woodcutting 71) and return to Sylas for the reward.

steps.detail: Sequel to Land of the Goblins. Drink goblin potion to enter the temple disguised, THEN equip ghostspeak amulet + ring of visibility inside the crypt (equipping too early gets you expelled). Hopespear the ghost prophet asks you to free 5 goblin high priests' souls by rekilling them completely unequipped (no weapons/spells/armour -- jewellery like ghostspeak/ring is fine, but Morytania legs are not) and collecting each one's bones before summoning the next (old bones despawn otherwise). Priests: Snothead (32, SW), Snailfeet (56, SE), Mosschin (88, NW), Redeyes (121, NE, stat-draining), Strongbones (184, N, hardest -- summons skoblins, drains stats, hits up to 18; recommended 70+ melee/Prayer for Piety or Chivalry). Can restock/bank between fights (goblin potion re-needed to re-enter, ghostspeak not). Finish by fairy-ringing to Yu'biusk (code BLQ) and burying the collected bones (can be done in batches).

Master-difficulty capstone quest, one of the deepest prereq chains in the game (Family Crest, Heroes' Quest incl. Shield of Arrav/Lost City/Merlin's Crystal/Dragon Slayer I, Shilo Village line, Underground Pass line, Waterfall Quest, 107 QP). Must be able to beat a level-187 demon (Nezikchened, fought up to 3x). Flow: talk Radimus Erkle at the guild, travel to Kharazi Jungle south of Shilo Village, chop through and map all 3 jungle sections with Radimus notes, get bullroarer from a Jungle forester, summon Gujuo, crawl into Mossy rock cave (50 Agility). Smith a golden bowl (2 gold bars + hammer), have Gujuo enchant it (42+ Prayer, can fail), fill with sacred water from the pool, squeeze through a bookcase crevice, lockpick a gate, smash 3 boulders, force a 2nd gate (50 Str), place gems on carved rocks by color to open a marked wall (Soul/Mind/Earth/Law/Law rune order) and get the binding book. Douse Ungadulu's fire with the bowl, bind him with the book, fight and kill Nezikchened (prayer drained to 1/10 at fight start; ranged/melee+protect-melee recommended, he has high magic resist). Get Yommi tree seeds from Ungadulu, water them, brew a bravery potion (ardrigal + snake weed + vial water) for a branching "evil" (short, kill Viyeldi for a glowing dagger) or "good" (long, cast Holy Force on Zekin) path through a second cave to restore the water source, fighting 3 named skeletons (lvl 106/100/92) for crystal pieces either way. Grow+carve a Yommi totem from the restored tree, use on an old totem pole, survive 4 unavoidable melee hits (up to 72 dmg total, pray Protect Melee) while Nezikchened respawns after each of 3 skeletons, get gilded totem from Gujuo. Hand gilded totem + notes to Radimus at the guild, pick 4 skills for the 30k xp reward, finish. Very high spine value as a QP/skill-chain gate for later quests + the quest-cape line.

Experienced-tier Sailing quest sequel to Troubled Tortugans. Investigate the Red Reef Trading Company on injured navigator Floopa's behalf: sink or crew-kill two pirate ships at sea, then fight through six pirates and captain Black Eye Bethel (3-stage weapon upgrades) at Last Light, help company founder Spencer Brentwood repair underwater coral dredgers (fighting a safespottable giant lobster), and learn the company's coral shortage is driving their conflict with the tortugans over the Little Pearl.

steps.detail: Long-chain endgame Varrock quest gated behind six other quests plus 55 Smithing/52 Hunter. Talk to Elias in the Jolly Boar Inn, follow a forest trail of inspectable clues east to a trapdoor dungeon, kill armoured zombies and bottle their red mist (3 before meeting Arrav, 3 more after) to investigate the undead uprising. Report to Elias at Varrock Palace, then head to Ruins of Camdozaal, get a chaos core from Chaos Golems and combine it with a mined barronite deposit at the Sacred Forge to imbue a barronite ore. Finally receive the Shield of Arrav from Captain Rovin in Varrock Palace, dig through Reldo's scrolls/records to identify the Fitzharmon descendant among six named Varrock NPCs, then confront Dimintheis in south-east Varrock to trigger the finale cutscene.

steps.detail: Direct sequel to Dwarf Cannon. Cross the river to Dondakan via the Dwarven Ferryman, then collect 3 Dwarven lore book pages in the Dwarven Mine (kill scorpions, search mine carts, mine any non-Adamantite/Coal rock). Make a golden cannonball (gold bar smelted at a furnace) and fire it at Dondakan's rock to get a Schematic; combine it with base schematics from the lore book and further schematics from the Dwarf Engineer, then smith a gold helmet. Final battle: equip the gold helmet + best pickaxe, mine 6 or 15 gold ore inside the arena (15 lowers the boss from level 125 to 75), then fight one of three Arzinian Avatar variants (chosen by your highest combat stat) within an 8-minute time limit -- removing the helmet mid-fight aborts the attempt. Talk to Dondakan again to finish.

steps.detail: Master-tier Mahjarrat-lore quest continuing the vampyre/Arrav storyline. Elias White helps you find a way to free Arrav from Zemouregal's necromantic control: raid the Uzer Mastaba tomb (lever/trap puzzle, golem guard, coloured-tile crossing) for heart-preservation knowledge, sneak through Trollweiss Mountain tunnels into Zemouregal's old fort and briefly meet a still-captive Arrav, then infiltrate Zemouregal's Base — insulated boots past energy surges, a 4-digit vault code puzzle, and a crossbow-grapple fire-trap crossing — to steal Arrav's heart, before fighting a mind-controlled Arrav while dodging venom pools left by armoured zombies.

steps.detail: Board Bill Teach's ship and sabotage an enemy pirate vessel: cut their sail rigging, blow up their powder barrel, patch your own ship's leaks, plunder their cargo for loot, then repair and fire your cannon (canister rounds first to kill 3 pirates, then cannonballs to hole their ship 3 times) to win the sea battle.

steps.detail: Long quest chain flattened for prereqs: Cook's Assistant -> Recipe for Disaster subquests Freeing Pirate Pete + Another Cook's Quest; Priest in Peril -> Rum Deal; Big Chompy Bird Hunting + (Jungle Potion -> Druidic Ritual) -> Zogre Flesh Eaters; Rum Deal + Zogre Flesh Eaters -> Cabin Fever; Creature of Fenkenstrain + Cabin Fever are the direct gates. Walkthrough: talk to Brother Tranquility on Mos Le'Harmless (no pets), head north into the windmill, pull the statue and climb down, don underwater gear and dive, repair stairs, climb a ladder, peer through a peephole, then return to Brother Tranquility to be shuttled back and forth to Harmony Island. At Edgeville Monastery search the SW bookcase on the ground floor for a book, read it, then equip a Holy symbol back on Harmony Island and recite the prayer inside the windmill. At Dr Fenkenstrain's jail (NE of Canifis, via east/west stairs then a ladder) equip a Ring of charos and talk to him; talk to Rufus in Canifis food store repeatedly for a wolf whistle + crate part; make/buy 10 wooden cats, build a crate with a false bottom next to the doctor, fill it with cats, blow the whistle to summon Rufus, and give him the shipping order on the crate. Back at Harmony Island, dive to the shipwreck for a fuse, tinderbox, and keg; use the keg+fuse on the nearby monastery door and light it; inside, kill 4 Sorebones (level 57) for a cranial clamp, brain tongs, 3 bell jars, and 30 skull staples; deliver these to Fenkenstrain and talk to Brother Tranquility to prep the final fight. Instanced fight: confront Mi-Gor to trigger the Barrelchest (level 190) battle — each of his attacks disables Prayer, re-enabling it right after each hit avoids damage, or safespot from the monastery entrance by leaving and re-entering. Report the kill to Brother Tranquility to finish.

Master-tier Varlamore capstone. Requires both The Heart of Darkness and Perilous Moons, which each independently require Twilight's Promise -> Children of the Sun (shared ancestor, flattened to 4 unique quests). Infiltrate the Twilight Emissary cult undercover to steal a scroll (guarded by a hard-hitting Enforcer, lockpick puzzle), help Queen Zyanyi capture and interrogate cult leader Forebearer Janus in a safehouse heist, travel to Cam Torum to expose a bribed dwarf official (drink-barrel puzzle) and race the Tullus twins to an Old One keystone in Neypotzli (fight Lucius+Chimalli), defend the Crypt of Tonali through six cultist waves, defeat Ennius Tullus in a two-phase enrage boss fight, then solve chamber puzzles in the Tonali Cavern en route to Mokhaiotl.

Master-difficulty quest-cape gate. Skill reqs alone are steep (65 Crafting/60 Slayer/60 Smithing/60 Fishing/55 Runecraft, 60 Mining boostable), and the quest chain is deep: The Fremennik Isles -> The Fremennik Trials; Lunar Diplomacy -> Lost City + Rune Mysteries + Shilo Village -> Jungle Potion -> Druidic Ritual; Mountain Daughter; Heroes' Quest -> Dragon Slayer I + Lost City + Merlin's Crystal + Shield of Arrav -- roughly 10 prior quests deep before you can even start. Walkthrough: investigate a basilisk attack in Rellekka, get framed and exiled, then gather 3 components in any order (a Fremennik shield from dagannoth/market NPC drops or free from Bardur with a Ring of charos(a); Lunar glass + an enchanted V's sigil made via Lunar Isle/Astral Altar/smithing; a Polishing rock from a geyser puzzle at Mountain Camp) to reforge V's shield. Return to Rellekka, wield V's shield and grind basilisk kills to 100% in the market (Monstrous Basilisk=10%, Basilisk=3.33%), then sail to Island of Stone, solve a Mastermind-style rune code-door puzzle, and fight Typhor (218) then the endboss Jormungand (363, weak to crush, 2 avoidable specials, pray Magic) while keeping V's shield equipped throughout.

steps.detail: Grandmaster-tier, 5-chapter quest. Chapter I: report to King Narnode about Glough's escape. Chapter II: infiltrate Glough's dungeon via the Agility Route or the Tanking Route (web-slashing) to reach and kill Kruk (level 207). Chapter III: defeat Kob (185) and Keef (178), sneak into Ape Atoll disguised as Assistant Le Smith, and play the Monkey Gear Solid stealth minigame back to Kruk's dungeon. Chapter IV: major combat/story chapter (6933B walkthrough). Chapter V: 3-phase final battle strategy against Glough (431) with combat-style-dependent tanking or safespotting per phase. Very high spine value -- unlocks the heavy ballista and Crash Site Cavern demonic gorillas, both major mid-late-game combat gates.

Grandmaster Mahjarrat-storyline quest, sequel to Defender of Varrock, chasing the Stone of Jas. Thaerisk sends you to kill 2 assassins, then investigate Movario at the Fight Arena: bribe/charm the Khazard Launderer for info, train a broav at Feldip Hills to sniff out Movario's hideout, then break into his underground base solving a rune-symbol door puzzle, a bookcase-lever/wire maze, a trapped bed chest, and a weight/pressure-gauge puzzle to recover two volumes of notes. Rally allies: rescue Idria from mercenaries at McGrubor's Wood, plant a teleorb on a shady stranger near Draynor for Akrisae, get a snapdragon seed from Thaerisk and enrich it with pink dye + Betty's help, plant it at Falador castle. Use NPC Contact to summon Turael/Mazchna/Cyrisus/Duradel about Lucien, harvest the enriched snapdragon for a truth serum to interrogate a captured shady stranger, then recruit Ghommal/Harrallak/Sloane at the Warriors' Guild. Infiltrate Black Knights' Fortress in disguise, descend into the Black Knight Catacombs, farm elite black armour off Elite Black Knights, rescue Silif and swap armour with him, then face Surok Magis (magic-only, 450hp, Vorkath-style attack rotation: bind/weaken his summoned warriors, telegrab-and-alch his explosive orbs, counter his elemental surges with the opposite element) atop the fortress. Teleport to Lucien's camp via a strange teleorb, then descend the Chasm of Tears: collect 4 elemental orbs from braziers, solve elemental-block puzzles inside skull tunnels, and match herblore-ingredient offerings to 8 of 13 statues (offerings vary per player) to open the final door. Finish with the Balance Elemental (524, prayer-switches by its attack style, drains stats every 3-4 hits, doubles up at 25% hp) then two Tormented Demons alongside the Guardians of Armadyl (can be cheesed by letting the Guardians finish them off from behind a pillar) before returning to Idria to complete.

Continues the Myreque/vampyre storyline after Ranis Drakan's death. Investigate Slepe's sleeper plague (tail Carl by hiding in sequence to find his supplier, kill lab-assistant Kroy from behind cover with ranged, destroy both lab tables). Trek with Ivan Strom through the swamp (vine bridge, kill nail beasts, repair a log bridge, kill low-tier vampyres with the Ivandis flail) to Burgh de Rott. Boat to the Icyene Graveyard, solve a mausoleum-door puzzle, brief the Myreque council, then mine 15 Daeyalt ore in the Ver Sinhaza mines and help Safalaan retrieve a book past a mutated bloodveld. Disguise as a Vyre noble (buy/upgrade the outfit via Polmafi Ferdygris) to enter Meiyerditch, then fight Damien Leucurte (stomp out his periodic magic fires or your hits do nothing) with the Ivandis flail. Cut 8 blisterwood logs in Darkmeyer's Arboretum after solving a two-valve gallon puzzle, forge the Blisterwood flail (enchanted ruby sickle + blisterwood log + Ivandis flail), then fight the endgame boss Vanstrom Klause in two phases: phase 1 dodge his acid-bloodveld/blood-orb-heal/stare-into-darkness specials under Protect from Magic; phase 2 (after he self-heals 200hp and drops specials) dodge repeated lightning strikes since prayer no longer blocks his damage. Unlocks Darkmeyer city.

Heavy prerequisite chain (Wanted!, Recruitment Drive+Black Knights' Fortress+Druidic Ritual, The Lost Tribe+Goblin Diplomacy+Rune Mysteries, Priest in Peril, Enter the Abyss, Troll Stronghold+Death Plateau, Doric's Quest) plus 65 Smithing/50 Runecraft/50 Fletching. At Doric's house forge a bow-sword from a mithril 2h sword + bow string. Give it to the monk, put the orb he provides into a large pouch, then run the pouch through the Wilderness Abyss to the Law Altar and on to the Entrana church to trigger a swap cutscene. Search the resulting dead monk back at Paterdomus, return to Entrana's high priest, then finish at Falador Park with Sir Tiffy Cashien.

steps.detail: Also needs Desert Treasure I started (for the ring of visibility) though not a full completion requirement. Murder-mystery continuing the Hazeel Cult/General's Shadow storyline. Investigate Ceril's murder at Carnillean Mansion (broken window, hidden room behind a false wall), then track and fight Evelot (level 148, drains prayer on her specials) near the Fight Arena bar by following a clue trail. Visit the Hazeel Cult hideout via an Ardougne sewers raft to enlist Hazeel's help, lockpick a hidden chest behind the mansion's cooking shelves for a scroll. Travel to Weiss, question Big Fish and Snowflake, then fight a level-262 Assassin (lures you with smoke bombs, throws poison vials). Solve a multi-stage code-lock dungeon under Weiss (a 'BLOOD' gate code, a chest code, a brazier-lighting order, an arrow-direction gate code, combining two jewel shards) to reach the final boss, the Strange Creature -- resupply with ranged/magic gear first. Return to the mansion guard to finish; unlocks the Phantom Muspah boss.

steps.detail: Grandmaster capstone that unlocks Prifddinas. Disguise as an Ardougne knight (dyed helm + tabard) to free Elena from Ardougne Castle's dungeon, infiltrate West Ardougne as a mourner to stir unrest (burn grain sacks, talk to townsfolk), then switch back to knight gear to rile up East Ardougne merchants. Fight two waves of guards ('Battle of West Ardougne' at Mourner HQ, 'Battle of East Ardougne' at the castle), triggering exile to Lletya. Learn Arianwyn's rebellion plan, then solve a six-pillar light puzzle at Baxtorian Falls (6 items keyed to per-pillar riddle clues) to reach the Well of Voyage. Grow a cadantine seed, get a crystal seed enchanted, then track down Lord Amlodd and Lady Trahaearn (repairing an elderly elf's mechanism with a runite bar) to reach the Enchanted Valley and brew an inversion potion. Solve the Grand Library's nine house-seal puzzles (separate sub-guide), then find Lord Crwys and Lady Hefin, retrieve an orb of light by killing two Iorwerth guards, track Ysgawyn via a footprint/clue trail, and survive the attack on Lletya -- a bow fight against Arianwyn (dodge orange 1x1 bomb arrows, re-enable prayers after purple ones). Solve a five-symbol clue chain across Lletya and outdoor dig sites to find Lady Ithell and Lady Meilyr, then defend a dwarf camp for 4 minutes inside the Underground Pass and beat Essyllt, before the finale: a magic-only boss fight against the Fragment of Seren with 4 recurring specials (teleport-to-boss, copy/split identification, spawned healing orbs to snipe, and a near-max-hit freeze nuke requiring overheal via Saradomin brews). Completing it opens Prifddinas.

steps.detail: Ancient Magicks Bursting/Barraging. Requires Desert Treasure.

Track-and-kill loop, not a fixed dungeon: an enchanted symbol acts like a Hot/Cold treasure-trail clue to locate one of three wandering deep-Wilderness followers (Porazdir, Justiciar Zachariah, Derwen) at a time; each can only be damaged by its own god spell, hits hard (up to 43) with both magic and melee, and despawns if not killed fast enough. Recommended loop: locate with the symbol -> bank/gear up at Ferox Enclave -> kill and grab the remains -> hand in to Kolodion -> repeat for the other two. Spawn locations rotate every ~45 minutes of Wilderness time, per-player. High PKer risk in deep Wilderness; dying to a player loses the cape (killer gets 60,000gp).

Grandmaster sequel to Dragon Slayer I; also requires having started the pyre-ship part of the Barbarian Training miniquest for Ancient Cavern access. Investigate a mural under Crandor, then find and solve a 24-piece jigsaw map on Fossil Island, build a rowboat to Lithkren, and read a skeleton's diary. Use a Catspeak amulet to find Bob the Cat and have the Sphinx enchant permanent cat-speech. On Lunar Isle, brew a dream potion and fight Robert the Strong inside Bob's dream (melee/crush-only fight, hide behind pillars to dodge his special). Collect 4 dragon key pieces: Karamja (navigate a trapped jungle-temple maze avoiding golem melee/ranged/magic by colour), Morytania (craft a locator orb and dowse for a buried piece in Mort Myre Swamp), Ungael (kill Vorkath, then solve a lever/timed-run dungeon puzzle), Kourend (statue-placement riddle in a skeleton-filled crypt). Reforge the key at the Ancient Cavern by casting Fire Wave/Surge on 3 dragon heads, then open the Lithkren doors. Rally Varrock/Falador/Ardougne (or Kandarin) rulers for 'A World United', then 'The Assault': defend a ship from a boarding raid, fight through checkpointed waves of increasingly dangerous dragons (green/blue, then black/steel/brutal red, then mithril/adamant/rune -- the last two have hazardous specials needing antidote++/insulated boots), and finish with a 4-phase Galvek fight requiring full dragonfire protection and phase-specific dodges (fire traps, stat-drain beam, wave-gaps, earth-bind projectiles).

steps.detail: Grandmaster capstone finale to the vampyre/Myreque questline. Lord Lowerniel Drakan, the last 'Blood Moon', is trying to reclaim the vampyre throne and destroy Morytania to do it. Player works through Castle Drakan's key-and-clock puzzles, a running Blood Hunt chase through the woods, defends Another Night at the Theatre, then fights a multi-phase final battle culminating in Wyrd and then Drakan himself across three phases before the sun rises.

steps.instruction: Complete Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire
steps.detail: Grandmaster capstone: the Ancient Vault hub has 4 empty statues, one per medallion looted from the 'Forgotten Four' bosses guarding fragments of the fallen Empty Lord's empire. Familiar Faces: solve a mural/mining intro at the Digsite then kill the Ancient Guardian (shield regens unless meleed; dodge falling rocks by avoiding shadowed tiles) and solve a totem/cell golem puzzle. Vardorvis: sail to the Stranglewood, defend Kasonde from strangled for 3 minutes with barricades/satchels, brew a strangler serum from gathered herbs, kill Vardorvis (slash weapon, dodge axes/root splats/prayer-disabling darts) then Kasonde himself (ranged/kite, avoid poison splats, out-DPS his healing). Perseriya: through Guardians of the Rift's Scar, solve 3 randomized puzzle rooms (nerve-combination circuits, cerebral-orb maze, rune-nerve crafting) to burn 3 ships, then fight the Leviathan with Ranged+Shadow spells (prayer-switch by attack colour, stun and hit its back). Duke Sucellus: escape a prison cell, solve gate-code puzzles (chest passwords/combinations) while dodging Jhallan, then defeat the sleeping Duke via a mushroom-poison mechanic and dodge his ice-spike/acid/eye-gaze attacks behind pillars. The Whisperer: navigate the Shadow Realm of Lassar's undercity collecting shadow-torch schematics and keys while managing a sanity meter, then fight a magic-weak boss with frequent prayer switches. After all 4 medallions are placed, the finale ("The Desert Treasure") has you fight a Mysterious Figure, then Sliske's four wights one after another (Forsaken Assassin, Ketla the Unworthy, Kasonde the Craven, Persten the Deceitful -- each with distinct dodge mechanics) before a final cutscene with Azzanadra.
